metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Cerrone - Supernature.flac
metadata.title: Supernature
metadata.lyrics:
[01:18.96] Once upon a time
[01:45.31] Science opened up the door
[01:49.36] We would feed the hungry fields
[01:53.58] Tilll they could'nt eat no more
[01:56.16] But the potion that we made
[01:59.95] Touched the creatures down below
[02:04.93] And they grew up in a way
[02:07.64] That we'd never seen before
[02:11.40] Supernature, supernature, supernature, supernature
[03:31.28] They were angry with the man
[03:34.84] Cause he changed their way of life
[03:38.89] And they take their sweet revenge
[03:42.73] As they trample throught the night
[03:45.38] For a hundred miles or more
[03:50.51] You could hear the people cry
[03:54.36] But there 's nothing you can do
[03:57.15] Even god is on their side
[04:03.46] Supernature, supernature, supernature, supernature
[05:39.22] How can I explain
[05:39.65] Things are different today
[05:42.83] Darkness all around
[05:47.42] And nobody makes a sound
[05:51.94] Such a sad affair
[05:55.70] No one seems to care
[05:59.10] Supernature, supernature, supernature, supernature
[06:02.91] Supernature supernature supernature...
[06:38.12] Better watch out
[06:41.13] There's no way to stop it now
[06:50.59] You can't escape it's too late
[06:53.98] Look what you've done
[06:56.77] There's no place that you can run
[06:58.45] The monsters made, we must pray
[07:01.50] Supernature ...supernature supernature
[07:06.73] Maybe nature has a plan
[07:08.04] To control the way of man
[07:09.06] He must start from scratch again
[07:09.79] Many battles he must win
[07:11.08] Till he earns his place on earth
[07:11.80] Like the other creatures do
[07:12.59] Will there be a happy end
[07:13.36] Now that all depends on you
[07:14.44] Supernature, supernature, supernature, supernature
[09:45.36]
